title: Lofoten Islands (Norway) 4K cinematic drone footage. Beaches, Rorbus, Hike Views - Chill & immersive
creator: WXperiences - Cinematic Travel
notes: DRAFT CANDIDATE -- produced in a cloud (Cowork) session; not yet cross-checked against the live exemplars directory for duplicates at the time of drafting (a freshness check is performed immediately before commit). Sourced to fill the Norway gap flagged during this project's own reference-pack review (no Lofoten/Norway exemplar found among ~49-50 existing records as of 2026-07-20). Verified this session via WebFetch of the YouTube oEmbed endpoint (https://www.youtube.com/oembed?url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pBIiyHbR6Mc&format=json), which returned title='Lofoten Islands (Norway) 4K cinematic drone footage. Beaches, Rorbus, Hike Views - Chill & immersive', author_name='WXperiences - Cinematic Travel', author_url='https://www.youtube.com/@WXperiences', provider_name='YouTube' -- confirms a real, currently-public video with this exact title/creator, and the channel name itself ('Cinematic Travel') signals a dedicated travel-cinematography operation rather than a general vlog. The watch-page fetch (for CC-license/upload-date/duration/description) returned HTTP 429 (rate-limited) this session, consistent with every other candidate processed this session; not retried further or worked around (per this session's tool policy against bash/curl fallbacks), so `license_category` is the conservative all-rights-reserved default on absence of a positive CC finding, not a directly confirmed one -- re-check when reachable. A WebSearch this session ('"WXperiences" youtube cinematic travel drone channel') did NOT surface the channel directly -- results were unrelated generic drone-channel content, no press coverage, no analytics-tracker listing, no third-party corroboration of reach found. This is a genuinely weaker external corroboration than most other candidates in this expansion batch (comparable to jishinnraj-kyrgyzstan-sky-bridge.json's corroboration gap), though the oEmbed-confirmed dedicated channel branding is still a real (if soft) legitimacy signal that jishinnraj's record lacked. `award_or_showcase_provenance` is left null: no contest/broadcaster/festival attribution found. `scores` are `scores_provenance: manually_estimated`, calibrated near this pack's 'un-curated-but-consistent travel-drone channel' tier (flaviufpv-madeira-fanal-forest-fpv.json's 0.72/0.72, explorertheworld4k-kyrgyzstan-wild-beauty.json's 0.73/0.74/0.75) rather than the 'reputable curator/dedicated channel with some external corroboration' tier (ecksplorer-faroe-mulafossur-waterfall.json's 0.75/0.74/0.77) -- reflecting a real, dedicated cinematic-travel channel but with no external corroboration located this session. `composite_score` is NOT a call to the repo's real `compute_composite_score`/`default_weights()` functions (no shell access to the user's local Python environment this session); it was computed via an equivalent equal-weighted-mean-of-present-signals formula run in this session's own Python: (0.73+0.73+0.75)/3 = 0.7366666666666667, rounded to 0.7367. Re-run through the real repo function before treating this figure as certified. `composition` stays null, matching Milestone 1 convention.

editorial_style.pacing_notes: Not independently reviewed via playback this session. The title's own 'Chill & immersive' framing implies deliberately slow, ambient pacing (consistent with the moderate-high motion_smoothness estimate above), which is a text-provenance inference from title language, not a genuine cut/shot-length observation -- correct if a live-playback review finds otherwise.
